name: SAP Fieldglass Vendor Management System API
what_it_does: SAP Fieldglass REST API for vendor management system (VMS) and contingent workforce management. Enables AI agents to manage contingent worker and contractor requisitions, handle statement of work (SOW) and services procurement, access timesheet and expense approval workflows, retrieve vendor and supplier performance data, manage worker onboarding and offboarding, access total workforce analytics, integrate with HR and ERP systems for workforce data, and connect contingent labor data with finance and procurement systems.
use_cases: Managing contractor requisitions and approvals from procurement automation agents
Processing timesheet submissions and approvals from contingent workforce agents
Accessing vendor performance analytics from supplier management agents
Integrating contingent workforce data with SAP ERP from workforce analytics agents
not_for: Permanent employee HR management without contingent and contract workforce focus
Small business without enterprise VMS and procurement scale
Single-vendor staffing without multi-vendor comparison and compliance
best_when: A large enterprise using SAP Fieldglass to manage contingent workers and services procurement wants AI agents to automate requisitions, timesheet processing, vendor management, and workforce analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Contingent workforce data includes contractor PII and hourly billing rates. SOW data contains confidential project and pricing information. Automated procurement must comply with corporate procurement policies and co-employment risk management.

auth.notes: SAP Fieldglass uses OAuth 2.0 via SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform). Client credentials for system-to-system integration. SAP API Hub for documentation and testing. Integration via SAP Integration Suite common. Enterprise-grade auth with SAP S/4HANA connectivity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise VMS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction-based and per-worker enterprise pricing; SAP licensing model
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Acquired by SAP 2014. Market leader for enterprise VMS alongside Beeline and IQNavigator. Used by Fortune 500 companies for contingent workforce. Processes $50B+ in external labor annually. Integrates natively with SAP S/4HANA, Ariba, and SuccessFactors.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; SAP enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Contractor billing and SOW data is confidential business information
No public MCP server — OAuth2 via SAP BTP with SAP Integration Suite
SAP BTP complexity — requires SAP ecosystem knowledge for authentication setup
Co-employment risk management — contractor access and project data automation must avoid joint employment liability
GDPR mandatory for EU contingent workforce data — right to erasure for contractors
Native SAP S/4HANA integration preferred over API for SAP-heavy environments
agent_readiness.security_notes: Contingent workforce and contractor PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 via SAP BTP. Multi-region. Co-employment risk management.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contractor PII and SOW data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 via SAP BTP. Multi-region. Enterprise-grade security.
